name: Token Extensions (Token-2022)
description: Solana's next-gen token program with transfer fees, confidential transfers, interest-bearing tokens, and more.

name: pump.fun
description: Viral token launchpad with a bonding curve mechanism. Launch a token in seconds.

name: Metaplex Token Metadata
description: The standard for on-chain token metadata on Solana. Supports fungible tokens, NFTs, and editions.

name: Streamflow
description: Token vesting, streaming payments, and locks. Widely used for team/investor token distribution.

name: Squads
description: Multisig and on-chain treasury management for teams. Control tokens, programs, and funds with a multisig.

name: SPL Token UI
description: Simple web interface for creating and managing SPL tokens without writing any code.
